findings.description: Section s3 describes that responseMessage, RESPONSE_HEADER_MESSAGES, and RESPONSE_BODY_MESSAGES are not needed for delayed-send tests. These are named identifiers explicitly mentioned in the source note and would be useful hints for retrieval when a user asks about these fields.
findings.source_evidence: Source note under 正常系ケースの準備: 'testShotsの定義 - responseMessage', '期待値及び準備データの定義 - RESPONSE_HEADER_MESSAGES', 'RESPONSE_BODY_MESSAGES'
